SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated

Class ProductionProfile

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated.ProductionProfile
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ProductionProfile extends Object implements Serializable
A time-marched production profile produced by IntegratedProductionModel.runProfile(double, double).

Each profile point captures the field rate, revenue, energy and emission rates, and the average reservoir pressure at a point in time. Aggregate cumulative production and revenue over the horizon are also stored. The profile is the natural input for field-economics (NPV/IRR) and emissions reporting.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:
  • IntegratedProductionModel.runProfile(double, double)

  • Method Details

    • add

      public void add(double timeYears, double rateSm3PerDay, double revenuePerDay, double energyKWhPerDay, double emissionsKgPerDay, double reservoirPressureBara)
      Adds a point to the profile.
      Parameters:
      timeYears - time in years
      rateSm3PerDay - field rate in Sm3/day
      revenuePerDay - revenue in currency per day
      energyKWhPerDay - energy in kWh per day
      emissionsKgPerDay - emissions in kg CO2 per day
      reservoirPressureBara - average reservoir pressure in bara

    • getPoints

      public List<ProductionProfile.Point> getPoints()
      Returns the profile points.
      Returns:
      list of points

    • getCumulativeProduction

      public double getCumulativeProduction()
      Returns the cumulative production over the horizon.
      Returns:
      cumulative production in Sm3

    • setCumulativeProduction

      public void setCumulativeProduction(double cumulativeProduction)
      Sets the cumulative production.
      Parameters:
      cumulativeProduction - cumulative production in Sm3

    • getCumulativeRevenue

      public double getCumulativeRevenue()
      Returns the cumulative revenue over the horizon.
      Returns:
      cumulative revenue in currency

    • setCumulativeRevenue

      public void setCumulativeRevenue(double cumulativeRevenue)
      Sets the cumulative revenue.
      Parameters:
      cumulativeRevenue - cumulative revenue in currency

    • getPeakRate

      public double getPeakRate()
      Returns the peak field rate over the profile.
      Returns:
      peak rate in Sm3/day
